about.title: ABOUT
about.text: With over 7 years of experience in Brand Identity Design, HOIEST (Hoi) has partnered with numerous brands to develop logos, typography, visual identities, and design assets for brand building.

expertise.title: EXPERTISE
expertise.identity_desc: Creating comprehensive visual systems including logo design, color palettes, typography, and brand guidelines.
expertise.visual_desc: Designing marketing collateral, packaging, digital assets, and visual content that strengthens brand presence.
expertise.strategy_desc: Developing strategic brand positioning through research, competitive analysis, and audience insights.

approach.title: MY APPROACH
approach.text: Every project begins with discovery. I conduct in-depth research to understand your business, audience, and competitive landscape. From there, I develop strategic concepts that are visually distinctive yet commercially viable. My process emphasizes collaboration and refinement, ensuring the final identity not only looks remarkable but also effectively communicates your brand's core values and mission.

contact.title: LET'S WORK TOGETHER
contact.subtitle: Ready to create something amazing together? Fill out the form below to schedule a quick chat so we can discuss your project. I typically respond within 48 hours.
